content_body: With Blue Ridge Mountain Kayaking, enjoy a 6-mile or 12-mile trip down the beautiful Toccoa River. Trip times will vary based on water levels. Experiencing amazing views only seen via river, you will find yourself needing to get back on the river time and again. The solitude, the beauty, and sounds will envelop you and de-stress you, creating an experience to be relived again and again.
title: Blue Ridge Mountain Kayaking
